items.title: DevFest Milano 2025 Organizer
items.description: Led the 2025 edition of DevFest Milano, focusing on innovation, accessibility, and human-centered technology through engaging sessions and workshops.

items.title: DevFest Milano 2024 Organizer
items.description: Co-organized one of the largest tech events in Northern Italy, featuring top speakers, hands-on workshops, and inclusive community experiences.

items.title: GDG Milano Organizer
items.description: Passionate about building and nurturing the tech community in Milan through events, workshops, and knowledge sharing since 2023
